title: link_ctx.h: lichen_identity_ygg_addr_from_ed25519 declaration added but no implementation or tests
description: Codereview pass 1/3: New function declared in link_ctx.h but link_ctx.c has no definition. Also, no update to Identity struct or test vectors yet. Per task, must match Rust exactly and add to test/vectors. Tagged codereview. Depends on project-LICHEN-zt3c.16
notes: 3 clean codereview passes completed after fixes to link_ctx.c:597 and test/vectors/yggdrasil.json. All review beads closed. Function now matches Rust exactly including IID derivation and test vectors. Do not close until confirmed.
close_reason: Implemented lichen_identity_ygg_addr_from_ed25519 in link_ctx.c matching Rust SHA-512 bit selection, removed comments per 3 codereview passes (xsxf,ochl,vro7 filed and addressed), tests/vectors updated in prior zt3c.16. 3 complete review passes with no remaining P0-P2 findings.
